title: Gmail Google voice
description:

1. Log in with a strong USA VPN, username, and password. Confirm recovery email if prompted.

2. Verify account with a new Nigerian phone number (if required).

3. Send your first text on Google Voice using a strong USA VPN.


Important:


- Wait 24 hours before changing your password.

- Text on Google Voice before adding Two-Step Authentication.

- Avoid PIA and Express VPN; use a strong VPN for a seamless experience.
